case_title: LEWIS, QUINETTA VS BENTITOU, FREDERIC J DBA PRESIDIO TRAVEL LODGE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, QUINETTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BENTITOU, FREDERIC J DBA PRESIDIO TRAVEL LODGE HODGES, DEBRA BENTITOU, KYLA L. BENTITOU, DBA PRESIDIO TRAVEL LODGE, HELLA FLUSS DBA PRESIDIO TRAVEL LODGE AND KYLA BENTITOU DBA PRESIDIO TRAVEL LODGE ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
